title: WEB3
heading: A Novel Web3
paragraph1: At first, Nasun will employ Web3 technology to organize, produce and distribute high end products and services for real world adoption. For the end users, it will be phased in organically over time following market trends. For the general public who did not seek it out, Web3 should either be invisible, nonexistent or a choice to opt-into.
paragraph2: Web3 products and services should succeed on their own in the open market and not be subpar to be hyped only inside an insular Web3/crypto community. Today, they are either subpar, pyramid schemes or things you just cannot form an enthusiastic community around except for the idea of profiting from it. All this is incompatible with what we believe is the true potential of Web3.
paragraph3: At the heart of Web3 is the technology of DLTs and smart contracts, complex concepts giving people more self-agency which also means more responsibility, something most don’t want to deal with unless they see an opportunity for financial gains. Mass adoption of Web3 should happen as end users love the products and services and want to get more involved as to fully utilize Web3 and benefit from it. The user must actively choose to participate.
paragraph4: We believe for Web3 to really shine it needs to get past this current culture of casino-style gambling off of cycles and pyramid schemes. Vapid communities built on fomo, greed and fear. Once Web3 is utilized to produce real products and services people love and enjoy then Web3 will finally shine.
paragraph5: Nasun intends to use this tech at its highest value which is to bring people of different backgrounds together to enjoy spending time with each other while making cool, fun things that not only excites us within the community but makes people everywhere happy.
